antipattern.symptom: One attendee holds the keyboard 80%+ of the session; rotation log shows zero rotations.
antipattern.root-cause: Facilitator not enforcing rotation; no rotation tool running.
antipattern.fix: Run templates/rotation-log.sh on a 10-min timer; rotate on alert.

antipattern.symptom: Agent emits 4+ consecutive suggestions accepted without human spoken-intent; agent is effectively driving.
antipattern.root-cause: Mob fatigue; humans rubber-stamp agent suggestions.
antipattern.fix: Hard rule: agent suggestion requires a human to repeat the intent in speech before commit; if not, suggestion is dropped.

antipattern.symptom: Single 90-min session with one driver; attendees disengage; decisions per hour collapses.
antipattern.root-cause: Topic felt urgent; facilitator skipped rotations 'to save time'.
antipattern.fix: Enforce rotation regardless of perceived urgency; if rotation is impossible, mob is the wrong format — switch to pair or solo.
